results.original_title: Pirates of the Caribbean: The Curse of the Black Pearl
results.overview: When wily pirate Captain Barbossa seizes Jack Sparrow’s beloved ship, the Black Pearl, and kidnaps the governor’s daughter, Elizabeth Swann, blacksmith Will Turner reluctantly teams up with the unpredictable pirate Jack to rescue her—only to uncover a terrifying curse that turns Barbossa’s crew into the undead.
results.title: Pirates of the Caribbean: The Curse of the Black Pearl

results.original_title: Pirates of the Caribbean: On Stranger Tides
results.overview: When Jack crosses paths with a woman from his past, he's not sure if it's love...or if she's a ruthless con artist using him to find the fabled Fountain of Youth.
results.title: Pirates of the Caribbean: On Stranger Tides

results.original_title: Pirates of the Caribbean: Dead Man's Chest
results.overview: Captain Jack Sparrow’s got a blood debt to pay: he owes his soul to the legendary Davy Jones, ghastly Ruler of the Ocean Depths. To escape eternal servitude aboard the Flying Dutchman, ever-crafty Jack must track down the still-beating heart of Jones. But he won’t do it alone: Will Turner and Elizabeth Swann are drawn back into another one of his perilous quests—assuming they can evade execution for aiding a pirate.
results.title: Pirates of the Caribbean: Dead Man's Chest

results.original_title: Pirates of the Caribbean: At World's End
results.overview: After losing Captain Jack Sparrow to the locker of Davy Jones, Will Turner, Elizabeth Swann, and Captain Barbossa journey to the ends of the earth to rescue him. And as the East India Trading Company tightens its grip on the seas under Lord Cutler Beckett—now in control of Davy Jones—the fate of piracy hangs by a thread. Now, they must unite the pirate lords for one final stand. But as loyalties are tested and alliances shift, each must ultimately choose where they stand in the battle for freedom on the high seas.
results.title: Pirates of the Caribbean: At World's End

results.original_title: Pirates of the Caribbean: Dead Men Tell No Tales
results.overview: Thrust into an all-new adventure, a down-on-his-luck Capt. Jack Sparrow feels the winds of ill-fortune blowing even more strongly when deadly ghost sailors led by his old nemesis, the evil Capt. Salazar, escape from the Devil's Triangle. Jack's only hope of survival lies in seeking out the legendary Trident of Poseidon, but to find it, he must forge an uneasy alliance with a brilliant and beautiful astronomer and a headstrong young man in the British navy.
results.title: Pirates of the Caribbean: Dead Men Tell No Tales

results.original_title: Pirates of the Caribbean: Bloopers of the Carribbean
results.title: Pirates of the Caribbean: Bloopers of the Carribbean

results.original_title: Pirates of the Caribbean: Tales of the Code: Wedlocked
results.overview: Wenches Scarlett and Giselle fix each other up for their wedding, in which they would each marry their groom. Upon realizing that both their grooms were the same man, Jack Sparrow, the two wenches found themselves in an auction led by the Auctioneer. This short film serves as a prequel to The Curse of the Black Pearl, and explains just why Jack Sparrow's boat the Jolly Mon was seen sinking at the beginning of the whole story; why the wenches were so upset with him; and how Cotton lost his tongue.
results.title: Pirates of the Caribbean: Tales of the Code: Wedlocked

results.original_title: A Karib-tenger kalózai: A lámpás titka
results.overview: Jack, Angelica and the relentless Captain Maynard race to claim the Lamp of Secrets. Familiar allies and rivals resurface, new bonds are forged and the seas hide powers no pirate has ever faced. Taking place after Dead Men Tell No Tales, Secrets of the Lamp is a fan film continuing the franchise with respect and passion.
results.title: Pirates of the Caribbean: Secrets of the Lamp

results.original_title: The Real Pirates of the Caribbean
results.overview: A droning account of several famous pirates & pirate bands interspersed with commentary by several unanimated experts, featuring movie clips, still painting, & repeated video that don't really convey the dramatic & violent lifestyle that is the topic of this would-be documentary. Contrary to the suggestion of its title, this is NOT an adjunct to the Disney film it attempts to expose
results.title: The Real Pirates of the Caribbean

results.original_title: Pirates of the Caribbean | Disneyland Resort
results.overview: Set sail on a treacherous voyage to the 17th century! As part of the Disneyland® Resort 70th Celebration we're sending you on a swashbuckling Point of View ride-along adventure! Experience Pirates of the Caribbean, one of Walt Disney's most beloved attractions. See rowdy rogues and ruthless rapscallions ransack Caribbean seaports with all the iconic music, mischievous charm, and Imagineering marvels. Sail past haunted Dead Man's Cove, navigate cannon fire between a fort and a twelve-gun galleon, and more. This is a breathtaking tribute to seven decades of storytelling and the magic of Walt's original park is asking one question: Will it be a Pirate's life for you?
results.title: Pirates of the Caribbean | Disneyland Resort

results.original_title: Lionfish: New Pirates of the Caribbean
results.overview: Armed with venomous spines, invisible to its prey, a pack hunter who terrorizes other fishes - watch the stunning adventures of lionfish. Get to know the fish's prowess to dominate the oceans, to the extent that its invasion endangers local marine life!
results.title: Lionfish: New Pirates of the Caribbean

results.original_title: The Golden Age of Caribbean Pirates
results.overview: What are the facts behind the legends'? Did pirates really force prisoners to walk the plank'. Was there really a Jolly Roger'? These questions and many more are answered in this compelling program that details what it meant to be a pirate.
results.title: The Golden Age of Caribbean Pirates

results.original_title: Disneyland: From the Pirates of the Caribbean to the World of Tomorrow
results.overview: The audience visits WED Enterprises and sees how Disneyland attractions are created, including Pirates and the new Tomorrowland.
results.title: Disneyland: From the Pirates of the Caribbean to the World of Tomorrow

results.original_title: Pirates Of The Caribbean: Accidentally Genius
results.overview: A Video Essay on Pirates Of The Caribbean
results.title: Pirates Of The Caribbean: Accidentally Genius

results.original_title: Pirates of the Caribbean Part 27
results.title: Pirates of the Caribbean Part 27

results.original_title: Treasure Hunting And The Pirates Of The Caribbean
results.overview: This documentary explores the history of treasure hunting and the pirates of Caribbean Let the games begin with Treasure Hunting.
results.title: Treasure Hunting And The Pirates Of The Caribbean

results.original_title: Extinct Attractions Club Presents: The Pirates of the Caribbean Story
results.overview: See the behind the scenes story as told by the people who worked side by side with Walt Disney on the most famous theme park attraction of all time! From the walk through concept to the final design in Disneyland and Disney Theme parks world wide.
results.title: Extinct Attractions Club Presents: The Pirates of the Caribbean Story

results.original_title: Lego Pirates of the Caribbean: Captain Jack's Tall Tales
results.overview: Climb aboard the Queen Anne's Revenge as Captain Jack Sparrow is captured by a crew of zombies in the latest CGI Animated adventure from Lego Pirates of the Caribbean 4!
results.title: Lego Pirates of the Caribbean: Captain Jack's Tall Tales

results.original_title: Pirates: Dead Men Tell Their Tales - The True Story of the Pirates of the Caribbean, A Documentary
results.overview: Step back in time and sort fact from fiction and discover the magic of the real Pirates of the Caribbean - investigating the stories of Blackbeard, Sir Henry Morgan, Captain Kidd, including the notorious women Pirates, Anne Bonny and Mary Read.
results.title: Pirates: Dead Men Tell Their Tales - The True Story of the Pirates of the Caribbean, A Documentary

results.original_title: 大海賊―復讐のカリブ海 / ジャズマニア
results.overview: One day lately in the seventeenth century, Spanish Santa Catalina Island is assaulted and its town is burnt down by the English pirates headed by Edgar. The governor and his wife are killed. However, the governor's son, Emilio, manages his escape and dives alone into the sea.
results.title: Great Pirates -Revenge in the Caribbean- / Jazzmania
